description: Supplemental Cloudflare WAF Custom Rules for Ahmed El-Baz LMS Platform (Reference - Free Plan May Not Support All)

rules.name: XXE Protection
rules.expression: (http.request.body contains "<!DOCTYPE" and http.request.body contains "<!ENTITY") or (http.request.body contains "SYSTEM" and http.request.body contains "PUBLIC")
rules.description: Block XML External Entity injection attempts

rules.name: CRLF Injection Prevention
rules.expression: http.request.body contains "\r\n" or http.request.body contains "%0d%0a" or http.request.uri contains "%0d%0a"
rules.description: Block CRLF (Carriage Return Line Feed) injection attempts

rules.name: Prototype Pollution Detection
rules.expression: (http.request.body contains "__proto__" and http.request.body contains "constructor") or (http.request.body contains "Object.assign" and http.request.body contains "prototype")
rules.description: Detect and block JavaScript prototype pollution attacks

rules.name: Unicode/Encoding Abuse
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "%u00" and http.request.uri.path matches "^.*%u[0-9a-fA-F]{4}.*$") or (http.request.body matches "\\u[0-9a-fA-F]{4}.*\\u[0-9a-fA-F]{4}.*\\u[0-9a-fA-F]{4}")
rules.description: Block obfuscated unicode encoding abuse patterns

rules.name: XZ Backdoor (CVE-2024-3094)
rules.expression: (http.request.body contains "liblzma" and http.request.body contains "_none_" and http.request.body contains "/usr/bin") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "xz-backdoor")
rules.description: Block indicators related to XZ Utils backdoor CVE-2024-3094

rules.name: Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228)
rules.expression: (http.request.body contains "${jndi:" or http.request.uri.query contains "${jndi:" or http.request.headers["x-forwarded-for"] contains "${jndi:" or http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "${jndi:") or (http.request.headers[*] contains "${lower:" and http.request.headers[*] contains "ldap://")
rules.description: Block Log4Shell exploit patterns targeting JNDI lookups

rules.name: MFA Bypass Prevention
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/auth/mfa" and http.request.method eq "POST" and not ip.src in {verified_mfa_ips}) or (http.request.uri.path contains "/auth/verify-mfa" and http.request.body contains "bypass" and http.request.body contains "skip")
rules.description: Block attempts to bypass multi-factor authentication

rules.name: GraphQL Introspection Block
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/graphql" and http.request.body contains "__schema" and http.request.method eq "POST") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/graphql" and http.request.body contains "__type" and http.request.method eq "POST")
rules.description: Block GraphQL introspection queries in production

rules.name: WebSocket Origin Validation
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/ws" or http.request.uri.path contains "/socket" or http.request.uri.path contains "/websocket") and not http.request.headers["origin"] contains "ahmedelbaz.qzz.io" and http.connection_type eq "WebSocket"
rules.description: Block WebSocket connections from unauthorized origins

rules.name: Slowloris Detection
rules.expression: (cf.time.until_close lt 300 and http.request.method eq "GET" and http.request.uri.path eq "/") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/api/" and cf.bot_management.score lt 30)
rules.description: Detect and challenge potential Slowloris-style connection exhaustion attacks

rules.name: Search Rate Limiting
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/api/search" or http.request.uri.path contains "/api/courses/search" or http.request.uri.path contains "/api/lessons/search") and http.request.method eq "GET" and cf.rate_limit.rate gt 60
rules.description: Rate limit search API endpoints to prevent abuse

rules.name: Geo-Restricted Admin Access
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/admin" or http.request.uri.path contains "/api/admin" or http.request.uri.path contains "/dashboard/admin") and not ip.geoip.country eq "EG"
rules.description: Block non-Egypt access to administrative endpoints

rules.name: API Schema Validation
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/api/" and http.request.method eq "POST" and http.request.body contains "<script" or http.request.body contains "DROP TABLE" or http.request.body contains "UNION SELECT" and not ip.src in {trusted_proxy_ips})
rules.description: Validate API request payloads against known attack patterns

rules.name: Request Anomaly Scoring
rules.expression: (http.request.body contains "alert(" or http.request.body contains "javascript:" or http.request.body contains "onerror=" or http.request.body contains "onload=" or http.request.body contains "eval(") and cf.threat_score gt 10
rules.description: Score and challenge requests with multiple anomaly indicators
